introSection: Colossu's Loop is a steel sit-down roller coaster located at Nicolandia Center Park in Brasília, Brazilian Federal District, Brazil. It originally operated at Park do Gorilão for an unknown amount of time, before arriving at its current location in 2008. Between 2008 and 2010, the ride was moved within the park.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is a Pinfari Zyklon roller coaster with a single loop and two helices. The loop is tall.

fullText:
Colossu's Loop is a steel sit-down roller coaster located at Nicolandia Center Park in Brasília, Brazilian Federal District, Brazil. It originally operated at Park do Gorilão for an unknown amount of time, before arriving at its current location in 2008. Between 2008 and 2010, the ride was moved within the park.

This is a Pinfari Zyklon roller coaster with a single loop and two helices. The loop is tall.
